title: Why Startup Funding Is Falling in India?
description:
India processed 22 billion UPI transactions in April 2026 up 25% from last year. But startup funding fell 16% in the same period. The reason is simple AI now builds in minutes what used to cost lakhs and months of development. Investors no longer see the same value in funding traditional startups. The money is going to founders who use AI as a real productivity multiplier. Emergent is an agentic AI vibe-coding tool that lets you launch production-ready apps without writing a single line of code. I built a financial tracker, my own website, and an app that pulls answers from ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini all in one place in under 5 minutes. Comment LINK and I’ll send you direct access.
#Emergent #IndiaStartups #Coding #AITools
